title: Google Sheet - Export Specific data from Monday

posts.author: Mora (Mora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone !
What i need is a way to create an automation that will get the data from Monday in a specific columns (eg. Name/Phone/Adress/Email/etc…) and then send them to a specific Google Sheet.

Before using Monday Crm i was using Google Sheet to automate some verry complex task that was saving me a lot of time and manipulation with AppScript that is conected to pre built templates in Drive
(eg. Creating Files(Doc/Pdf/Xls) - Sending Html Email with the created docs as atachement) Just by clicking a button(function in the appscript).

Thank you in advance

posts.author: JoshFromUnito (Hugh Neato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mora ! I’m from Unito, we’re a monday partner with an app on the marketplace here.

Unito lets you quickly sync data between monday columns and 50+ other tools (including Google Sheets!). So you can pick and choose exactly which columns you want to sync with a visual interface that’s (relatively) very easy to use.

It takes me around 10-15 minutes at this point to build a flow, and if you need help, I’m happy to jump on a call and walk you through it.

Here’s a tutorial I wrote on how to sync monday and Google Sheets.

posts.author: LupApps (Idan Lupo)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mora!

At Lup Apps, we just launched the ultimate app for you—Google Sheets Full Integration, the all-in-one solution to seamlessly connect Google Sheets with your monday’s workflows. You can check it out here.

  1. Custom Automations: Effortlessly set up automations to export data from specific columns (e.g., Name, Phone, Address, Email) directly into Google Sheets. You can trigger these exports automatically, saving time and eliminating manual work.
  2. Real-Time Sync: Enjoy real-time data syncing between monday and Google Sheets, ensuring your data is always up-to-date.
  3. Advanced Workflows: If you used AppScript to automate tasks like creating documents or sending emails with attachments, our integration offers the flexibility to automate similar workflows, fully integrated into your monday environment.

Feel free to try it out, and let me know if you need help getting started or would like a demo call!

Best of luck, and happy automating!

posts.author: Mykola (Mykola Pustovoychenko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mora

We have a tool exactly for that: resynced.io
You can decide on specific items and columns you’d like to sync and on sync direction for every column.

You can find detailed, step-by-step guide here: resynced.io - How to synchronize monday.com board and Google Sheets spreadsheet

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. I’m happy to help.
